codeReview.summary: Current HEAD still satisfies the feature contract. The treasury cleanup commit wraps the reviewed treasury routes in the repository-standard data/meta envelope, the compare-coingecko assertions were updated to the wrapped shapes, and the worker handoff plus current branch state show the required full gate, build, typecheck, lint, and endpoint smoke all passed after the cleanup commit.

summary: Reviewed current HEAD, the worker handoff, commit 4bbd419, and the current treasury/test files. The feature contract still holds on the branch and I found no blocking or non-blocking implementation issues.
